sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) a pile, as of the shew-bread set before Jehovah in the temple, Levit. 24:6 whence לֶחֶם הַמַּעֲרֶכֶת in the later books, i.q. in the older, לֶחֶם הַפָּנִים Neh 10:34 also without לֶחֶם 2Ch 2:3 also מַעֲרֶכֶת לֶחֶם 2Ch 13:11. שֻׁלְחַן הַמַּעֲרֶכֶת the table on which the loaves were placed, 2Ch 29:18.

(2) [“Plur.”] a battle set in array, an army, 1Sa 17:8.
